phase8_excerpt:
## PDF Creation

> **PDF Printing** works best when using Google Chrome. To save as PDF, in Chrome go to Print then Save as PDF. For the highest quality images use the following snippet to your brew:
> 
> ```html
> <style>
>   .phb{ background-image: url('https://i.imgur.com/whatever.png') }
> </style>
> ```
> 
> Snippet to your brew!
